projectDescription: An extension-based Android media center for streaming and downloading movies, TV shows, anime, and more, with no ads and full user control via a plugin system.
keyFeatures: Extension/plugin system for adding streaming sources via .cs3 files
Built-in media player with subtitle and audio track support
Watch tracking integration with AniList, MyAnimeList, Kitsu, Simkl, and Trakt
Cloudflare and DDoS-Guard bypass for extension authors
Repository system for discovering and updating extensions
Multiple subtitle providers (OpenSubtitles, Addic7ed, SubSource, Subdl)
publicApiSurface: MainAPI — abstract base class for all streaming provider extensions
MainAPI.load(url) — load a content detail/info page
MainAPI.loadLinks(data, isCasting, subtitleCallback, callback) — resolve playback links
ExtractorApi — abstract base class for video link extractors
BasePlugin / Plugin — base classes for CloudStream extension plugins
BasePlugin.registerMainAPI(element) — register a MainAPI provider from a plugin
BasePlugin.registerExtractorAPI(element) — register an ExtractorApi from a plugin
Plugin.registerVideoClickAction(element) — register a custom video action
@CloudstreamPlugin annotation — marks the plugin entry-point class
TvType enum — content type classification (Movie, TvSeries, Anime, Live, etc.)
SyncIdName enum — supported tracking/sync service identifiers
APIHolder.allProviders — global list of registered MainAPI providers
newMovieLoadResponse / newTvSeriesLoadResponse / newAnimeLoadResponse — response builder helpers
